headline: Citi Raised the PT on Western Digital Corporation (WDC), Here’s What’s Driving the Bullish Sentiment
summary: Western Digital Corporation (NASDAQ:WDC) has gained more than 200% over the past 6 months. More than 18% of these gains have been accumulated following the company’s fiscal Q3 2026 earnings released on May 1. During the quarter, the company posted $3.34 billion in revenue, up 45% year-over-year and ahead of the expected $3.25 billion. The […]
